query:
SELECT
  e.shift,
  DATE_FORMAT(rdd.date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  rdd.decision,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rdd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
WHERE e.is_active = 1
  AND e.role != 'ancillary'
  AND NOT (rdd.date BETWEEN '2026-11-23' AND '2026-11-29')
  AND NOT (rdd.date BETWEEN '2026-12-20' AND '2026-12-31')
GROUP BY e.shift, month, rdd.decision
ORDER BY e.shift, month, rdd.decision;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ya87wqF7ZWNWxEH.1126fdfe9484 --database 8TTpjTbwNRkm8QcJp9ko4t --execute 
SELECT
  e.shift,
  DATE_FORMAT(rdd.date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  rdd.decision,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rdd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
WHERE e.is_active = 1
  AND e.role != 'ancillary'
  AND NOT (rdd.date BETWEEN '2026-11-23' AND '2026-11-29')
  AND NOT (rdd.date BETWEEN '2026-12-20' AND '2026-12-31')
GROUP BY e.shift, month, rdd.decision
ORDER BY e.shift, month, rdd.decision;
